summary: Iteration 15: Tested Accounting Module synchronization features. All backend tests pass (8/8). All frontend tests pass. POST /api/invoices with status='Paid' correctly triggers auto journal entry with accounts 521/701/445. Live sync (useLiveSync) working via polling fallback.

minor.issue: WebSocket connections failing with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - polling fallback working correctly

issues: Chart warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - cosmetic issue, chart still renders

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/invoices with status='Paid' triggers autoPostPaidInvoiceJournal (fire-and-forget after res.status(201).json())
VERIFIED: Journal entry contains 3 items: 521 (Banques) debit=total, 701 (Ventes) credit=totalHT, 445 (TVA) credit=tvaTotal+centimes
VERIFIED: Journal entry has sourceRef = invoice.id for traceability
VERIFIED: autoPostPaidInvoiceJournal broadcasts RESOURCE_CHANGED with resource='journalEntries' via broadcast() WebSocket
VERIFIED: PUT /api/invoices/:id with Draft→Paid transition triggers auto-journal (regression test passed)
VERIFIED: Idempotence - calling 2x the same Paid case doesn't create 2 journal entries (guard 'already' exists)
VERIFIED: Manual journal entry creation (POST /api/journal-entries) remains possible
VERIFIED: Frontend Journal table displays 'Compte' column with OHADA account codes (521, 701, 445) in font-mono bold
VERIFIED: Frontend Journal table shows account names as subtitles (Banques, Ventes de produits finis, État - TVA facturée)
VERIFIED: data-testid='journal-account-code-{entryId}-{idx}' attributes present on all account code elements
VERIFIED: useLiveSync on ['journalEntries', 'transactions', 'invoices'] working - TVA declaration auto-updates within 12 seconds
VERIFIED: TVA sur factures payées card updates automatically when invoice is paid (22,614,000 FC → 22,630,000 FC)
VERIFIED: TVA à payer card updates automatically (22,614,000 FC → 22,630,000 FC)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test invoices with status='Paid' for testing auto-journal functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Accounting module synchronization is fully working. Key features tested: (1) POST /api/invoices with status='Paid' triggers auto journal entry with OHADA accounts 521/701/445, (2) Journal table displays account codes with data-testid attributes, (3) useLiveSync polling fallback (10s) working for Dashboard/TVA updates. WebSocket connections are failing but polling fallback compensates.

post_invoice_paid_auto_journal.details: POST /api/invoices with status='Paid' triggers autoPostPaidInvoiceJournal - journal entry created with sourceRef=invoice.id

journal_entry_accounts_521_701_445.details: Journal entry contains accounts 521 (Banques debit), 701 (Ventes credit), 445 (TVA credit)

journal_entry_source_ref.details: Journal entry has sourceRef = invoice.id for traceability

resource_changed_broadcast.details: autoPostPaidInvoiceJournal broadcasts RESOURCE_CHANGED with resource='journalEntries' after COMMIT

put_draft_to_paid_auto_journal.details: PUT /api/invoices/:id with Draft→Paid transition triggers auto-journal (regression test)

idempotence_no_duplicate.details: Calling 2x the same Paid case doesn't create 2 journal entries - guard 'already' exists

manual_journal_entry_creation.details: POST /api/journal-entries for manual entry creation works correctly

frontend_journal_compte_column.details: Journal table displays 'Compte' column with OHADA codes (521, 701, 445) in font-mono bold + account names as subtitles

frontend_journal_data_testid.details: data-testid='journal-account-code-{entryId}-{idx}' attributes present on 49 account code elements

frontend_dashboard_live_sync.details: useLiveSync on ['journalEntries', 'transactions', 'invoices'] - Dashboard cards present (Revenus, Dépenses, Bénéfice Net)

frontend_tva_live_sync.details: TVA declaration cards auto-update within 12 seconds when invoice is paid (22,614,000 FC → 22,630,000 FC)

use_live_sync_polling_fallback.details: Polling fallback (10s interval) working correctly - WebSocket failing but data still syncs

frontend_tests.test: Live sync - TVA value updates after invoice creation
Live sync - Journal entry appears after invoice creation

websocket_status.error: WebSocket is closed before the connection is established
websocket_status.note: This is a known issue in preview environments - production may have different behavior
